items.text: Performance improvements throughout the app — faster screen rendering, smoother chat flow, and better handling under load. No new features in this release — just a more refined experience.

title: Notifications now work reliably for everyone.

items.text: Notifications now work reliably for everyone — including users who reinstalled the app.
Get notified when a new message arrives while you're away from the app.
Anonymous text chat. Matched by interests, not by random luck. A 16-tier ranking system rewards quality conversation.
No photos, no followers, no algorithm. Just text.
